decisions.decision: Added PI funding signal line: 'NIH-funded · Division of Endocrinology & Diabetes · 27 publications' under PI team card
decisions.rationale: Tenure committee and grant reviewers need a productivity signal visible in <10 seconds. Used factual, verifiable info only (NIH funding is stated on the site, pub count matches existing '27 publications' text, division is public). Jeff can edit grant ID or framing — this is a strong default, not a final version.
